violations.text: Raw shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as lunchables, milk, and yogurt in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Pastelitos were observed held at 111-123. Per owner, pastelitos are delivered. Establishment is not approved to hot hold foods. PIC informed to cease sale of hot TCS foods. Updated food safety plan must be submitted and plans must be submitted. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items and clutter were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Several floor tiles in the retail sales area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
